pr.title: Record: 11L Int6 + SmearGate + BigramHash + Depth Recurrence

output.summary: Competitive 11L/512 model packs Int6+zstd quantization with SmearGate+BigramHash and introduces optional depth recurrence that loops shared blocks with iteration embeds.
techniques: Depth recurrence: 2 prelude + shared block looped 7× + 2 coda with per-iteration embeddings
Int6 per-row quantization + zstd-22 with vectorized packing
Muon optimizer w/ weight decay 0.03 plus SWA
